payload.answer: I can help handle this as a new additive personal fact, but I won’t save or merge anything without a selected option.
repair_options: Add as a separate new fact: “Nur and Sara are my twin daughters.”
Keep both existing related family facts and this new fact, if there are already memories about your children.
Ask for clarification before saving, if there may be ambiguity about who Nur and Sara are or how they relate to existing family memories.
